_comment: Lithos adoption manifest template. Copy into your repository and replace every [bracketed] value. local_workflow_file defaults to docs/AI_FLOW.md; replace it if your single local workflow file has a different repo-relative path. A manifest declares conformance; it does not authorize anything. Field reference and allowed values: docs/conformance-and-fixtures.md. Validate with: python scripts/verify_conformance_fixtures.py.

conformance_claim.statement: [project] conforms to Lithos 1.x under the full-lifecycle governance model

controller.assigned_to: [person or orchestrating agent under owner instruction]

architect.assigned_to: [person or role owning design and acceptance criteria]

knowledge_governance.evidence_retention: [where development logs, verification results, and run manifests are retained, and for how long]
knowledge_governance.stale_knowledge_handling: use-driven validation; archived, superseded, and deprecated records are immutable
